summary: P8 platform center CRUD UI and deployable frontend shell remain usable, but full project deployability is retracted. P9-P12 are still required because system members, departments, system roles, dictionaries, application/runtime, workflow/files/OpenAPI/audit UI and full browser E2E are not all completed.

deferredRisks.reason: Create-system idempotency still uses single-JVM memory storage. Production multi-instance consistency needs shared storage or a database idempotency table.
npm ci reports 2 moderate audit items. No npm audit fix --force was applied because it may force dependency upgrades; schedule dependency governance after trial deployment.
OpenAPI nonce replay, IP whitelist, OpenAPI idempotency conflict and high-concurrency scenarios remain recommended before production launch.
System members, departments, system roles and dictionaries still need real browser UI instead of generic placeholder workspace.
P8 partial deployability was previously overclaimed as full project deployability; PM must keep fullProjectDeployable=false until P9-P12 pass.
P9 browser UI smoke screenshots were generated, but full write-operation E2E has not completed.
